metadata.description: NEB calculations for reaction barriers on organic molecules using MACE-OFF23 and the Transition1x dataset.

plugins.name: nebskill
plugins.description: Nudged Elastic Band calculations for reaction barriers on organic molecules using the Transition1x dataset. Backends: MACE-OFF23, PySCF, and native ORCA (NEB-CI). Requires uv; Python dependencies installed automatically. Cluster jobs run via a companion HPC agent plugin (Rikyu/Hokusai).
